name: Chile Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the Cream of Wheat, flour, baking powder, and chili powder.
2. In another bowl, mix the egg substitute, milk, honey, and melted margarine until smooth. Stir this mixture into the dry ingredients until just moistened.
3. Add the corn, minced green onion, diced green chilies, diced pimiento, and shredded cheese to the batter. Mix well.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x9x2-inch baking pan that has been sprinkled with additional cereal.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
6. Cut into squares and serve.
